issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Instructions assume availability of bash, Terraform, and Node.js environments.

scenarios.name: add-dns-record-via-api
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides a fuller, more detailed example that closely matches the required structure, while Response B is minimal but still contains the essential elements.

scenarios.name: create-health-check-worker
scenarios.rationale: Response A directly exports a fetch method matching the rubric, while Response B uses an event listener pattern, slightly less aligned with the specified export requirement.
